NCT04209855.snippet: Source: Moore KN et al. N Engl J Med 2024;391:111-120 (MIRASOL).

evidence.label: Eligibility (AACT-derived)
evidence.text: AACT-derived (auto-populated 2026-05-04). Sex: FEMALE; min age 18 Years; healthy volunteers: f. CRITERIA: "Inclusion Criteria:~1. Female participants ≥ 18 years of age~2. Participants must have a confirmed diagnosis of high-grade serious epithelial ovarian cancer, primary peritoneal cancer, or fallopian tube cancer~3. Participants must have platinum-resistant disease:~   1. Participants who have only had 1 line of platinum based therapy must have received at least 4 cycles of platinum, must have had a response (CR or PR) and then progressed between >3 months and ≤ 6 months after the date of the las...

title: RapidMeta Oncology | Mirvetuximab Soravtansine for FRalpha+ Platinum-Resistant Ovarian Cancer v1.0
